text: White House: Trump has not set a firm deadline for an Iranian response.
text_zh: 白宫：特朗普尚未为伊朗的回应设定明确的最后期限。

text: ANY IDEAS?! ANYONE?!!? 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 有什么想法吗？！有人吗？!!? 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: White House: Iran can’t even pay their own people as a result of the blockade.
text_zh: 白宫：由于封锁，伊朗甚至无法支付本国人民的工资。

text: Trump does not consider Iran’s seizure of two ships to be a violation of the ceasefire, White House says.
text_zh: 白宫表示，特朗普不认为伊朗扣押两艘船只的行为违反了停火协议。

text: White House: Trump is a humanitarian at heart.
text_zh: 白宫：特朗普本质上是一位人道主义者。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 The southern town of Debl received the cross of Lord Jesus Christ, which had been provided by the Italian state as a replacement for the statue that was destroyed by the Israeli soldier a few days ago. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 南部城镇德布尔（Debl）收到了主耶稣基督的十字架，这是意大利政府为替换几天前被以色列士兵摧毁的雕像而提供的。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 U.S urges it’s citizens to leave Lebanon while they can
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 美国敦促其公民趁现在还有机会尽快离开黎巴嫩

text: Trump: “YOU CAN’T COMPROMISE ON SANITY AND COMMON SENSE!”
text_zh: 特朗普：“在理智和常识问题上，绝不能妥协！”

text: 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 US State Department urges American citizens to leave Lebanon while commercial flight options remain available. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 美国国务院敦促美国公民在商业航班仍可选择的情况下离开黎巴嫩。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇮🇷 Satellite image of 33 super-fast boats of the IRGC Navy after patrolling the Strait of Hormuz and returning to the naval base. They have successfully intercepted three ships that violated Hormuz patrol rules today and seized two of them with links to hostile…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Commander-in-Chief of Iran's Armed Forces, Amir Hatami: They say they have destroyed the Iranian Navy. This navy, which they claim was destroyed, is still strong and powerful today, and the enemy respects a distance of 300 kilometers from this navy. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇮🇷 卫星图像显示，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军的33艘超高速快艇在巡逻霍尔木兹海峡后返回海军基地。他们今天成功拦截了三艘违反霍尔木兹巡逻规则的船只，并扣押了其中两艘与敌对势力有关的船只……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗武装部队总司令阿米尔·哈塔米：他们声称已经摧毁了伊朗海军。这支被他们声称已被摧毁的海军，今天依然强大有力，敌人在这支海军面前保持着300公里的距离。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 U.S. Embassy Beirut: A security alert warned that ongoing airstrikes and instability across Lebanon, particularly in the south, Bekaa, and parts of Beirut, continue to pose serious risks to safety. The embassy urged U.S. citizens to exercise extreme caution, avoid travel to Lebanon, and be prepared to shelter in place or depart while commercial options remain available. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 美国驻贝鲁特大使馆：安全警报警告称，黎巴嫩全境（特别是南部、贝卡地区和贝鲁特部分地区）持续的空袭和动荡局势继续构成严重安全风险。大使馆敦促美国公民保持高度警惕，避免前往黎巴嫩，并做好就地避难或在商业选择仍可用时离开的准备。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah claims it downed four Israeli surveillance drones over Mansouri, Lebanon today. No IDF comment. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党声称今天在黎巴嫩曼苏里上空击落了四架以色列监视无人机。以色列国防军未予置评。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 Information is circulating that at approximately 04:35 on April 22, from the launch site on Wallops Island (Virginia, USA), the American company Rocket Lab successfully carried out a launch of the “HASTE” launch vehicle with a hypersonic payload as part of the Bubbles program. The reported range reached 2,000 km. We are awaiting official statements on the matter. The previous launch was conducted on February 28. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 有消息称，4月22日约04:35，美国火箭实验室公司（Rocket Lab）从瓦勒普斯岛（美国弗吉尼亚州）发射场成功发射了“HASTE”运载火箭，搭载了作为“气泡”（Bubbles）计划一部分的高超音速载荷。据报道，射程达到了2000公里。我们正在等待关于此事的官方声明。上一次发射是在2月28日进行的。推文

text: Open Source Intel According to a statement, 3 candidates were caught insider trading on Kalshi, including 2 Democrats and 1 Republican. The races involved were the Minnesota Democratic primary, Texas Republican primary, and Virginia Democratic primary. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047025887468544168/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据一份声明显示，有3名候选人在Kalshi平台上进行内幕交易，其中包括2名民主党人和1名共和党人。涉及的竞选包括明尼苏达州民主党初选、德克萨斯州共和党初选和弗吉尼亚州民主党初选。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047025887468544168/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CBS Reports: U.S. intelligence sources say Iran retains more military capability than publicly acknowledged, with about half its ballistic missiles and launchers intact, and roughly 60% of IRGC naval forces still operational. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）报道：美国情报来源称，伊朗保留的军事能力比公开承认的要多，其约一半的弹道导弹和发射装置完好无损，约60%的伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军力量仍处于作战状态。推文

text: Open Source Intel I wish I understood what actually happened on Friday. Trump posted that Iran agreed to hand over all nuclear material, never close the Strait of Hormuz, end its nuclear program forever, and abandon its proxies. But Iran didn’t agree to any of it. We know that because they didn’t even agree to show up to talks. So what actually happened behind the scenes? Pakistan giving over wrong info? tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：我真希望我能明白周五到底发生了什么。特朗普发帖称，伊朗同意交出所有核材料，绝不关闭霍尔木兹海峡，永远结束其核计划，并放弃其代理人。但伊朗并没有同意其中的任何一项。我们知道这一点，因为他们甚至没有同意参加会谈。那么幕后到底发生了什么？是巴基斯坦提供了错误信息吗？推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Former BP CEO, Lord John Brown, says he believes a net zero future, is the answer to the problems UK has now and warns that, "climate change is not a hoax, it's real." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047024213928677884/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯：前英国石油公司（BP）首席执行官约翰·布朗勋爵表示，他认为净零排放的未来是解决英国当前问题的答案，并警告称，“气候变化不是骗局，它是真实的。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047024213928677884/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah claims it targeted an IDF Humvee and troops in Qantara with attack drones, saying the strike was in response to Israeli ceasefire violations. IDF has not commented. tweet

text: Locals with the help of Italian UN forces erected a new one

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "The IDF says that the statue of Jesus that was damaged by a soldier in the Christian village of Debel in southern Lebanon was replaced by troops a short while ago." According to locals...no one knows where this cross is nor had they received it from the IDF. Nada Isn't this cross even orthodox nor catholic based on those drawings?
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“以色列国防军称，不久前部队更换了在黎巴嫩南部基督教村庄 Debel 被士兵损坏的耶稣雕像。” 据当地人称……没人知道这个十字架在哪里，也没有人从以色列国防军那里收到过它。纳达，根据那些图画，这个十字架甚至既不是东正教也不是天主教的，不是吗？

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon heads into a second round of ceasefire extension talks. Israeli withdrawal, Hezbollah's dissolution, and normalization are not close to being achieved. - Kann News tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩进入停火延期谈判的第二轮。以色列撤军、真主党解散和关系正常化远未实现。 - Kann News 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Russian President Putin is ready to meet with Ukrainian President Zelensky, but it can only be productive once the agreements are finalized, Kremlin spokesman Peskov said on Wednesday. He also noted that Moscow sees no political will on the part of Kyiv to "resolve the conflict." /372471 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 克里姆林宫发言人佩斯科夫周三表示，俄罗斯总统普京已准备好与乌克兰总统泽连斯基会面，但这只有在协议最终敲定后才能取得成果。他还指出，莫斯科认为基辅方面没有“解决冲突”的政治意愿。 /372471 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Hezbollah claims responsibility for an attack against an Israeli vehicle in Qunatra, saying it was in response to an Israeli drone strike tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 真主党声称对袭击 Qunatra 的一辆以色列车辆负责，称这是为了回应以色列的无人机袭击 推文

text: Open Source Intel Dozens of U.S. cargo planes loaded with munitions landed at Ben Gurion Airport today. - Channel 12 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 今天有数十架装载弹药的美国货机降落在本古里安机场。 - 第 12 频道 推文

text: Open Source Intel AP claims: More than 10 million barrels of Iranian oil have exited the Persian Gulf since the start of the U.S. blockade. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047018371384856782/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美联社声称：自美国封锁开始以来，已有超过 1000 万桶伊朗石油运出波斯湾。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047018371384856782/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s President: “The Islamic Republic of Iran has always welcomed and continues to welcome dialogue and agreement. Bad faith, siege, and threats are the main obstacles to genuine negotiation. The world is witnessing your hypocritical, empty talk and the contradiction between your claims and your actions.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗总统：“伊朗伊斯兰共和国一直欢迎并将继续欢迎对话与协议。恶意、围困和威胁是真正谈判的主要障碍。世界正在见证你们虚伪、空洞的言论，以及你们的声明与行动之间的矛盾。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli officials warn the Lebanon ceasefire could collapse at any moment - YNET tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列官员警告称，黎巴嫩停火协议可能随时崩溃 - YNET 推文

text: Open Source Intel Araghchi thanks Afghanistan for backing Iran and said Tehran is ready to help make peace between Afghanistan and Pakistan. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047015649189220722/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿拉格希感谢阿富汗对伊朗的支持，并表示德黑兰准备帮助实现阿富汗与巴基斯坦之间的和平。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047015649189220722/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @JenGriffinFNC : In a House Armed Services Subcommittee hearing last week the Director of the Pentagon's Defense Intelligence Agency warned of Iran's remaining missile and drone capabilities, which runs counter to what top Pentagon officials have told the press during televised briefings at the Pentagon. Director of the Defense Intelligence Agency Lt. Gen. James Adams (April 16) “Despite significant degradation of Iranian military capabilities through coalition strikes in operation Epic Fury Tehran retains thousands of missiles and one-way attack UAV's capable of threatening U.S. and partner forces throughout the region.” NEW: Iran still has more military capacity than Trump admin is admitting publicly, sources told @CBSNews. @ellee_watson @JimLaPorta and me: https://www.cbsnews.com/news/iran-more-capable-than-trump-admin-publicly-acknowledging/ - Jennifer Jacobs tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @JenGriffinFNC：在上周的众议院军事委员会小组听证会上，五角大楼国防情报局局长警告了伊朗剩余的导弹和无人机能力，这与五角大楼高级官员在五角大楼电视简报会上告诉媒体的内容相矛盾。国防情报局局长詹姆斯·亚当斯中将（4 月 16 日）：“尽管在‘史诗愤怒’行动中通过联军打击使伊朗的军事能力显著下降，但德黑兰仍保留了数千枚导弹和单向攻击无人机，能够威胁整个地区的美国及其伙伴部队。” 最新消息：消息人士告诉 @CBSNews，伊朗拥有的军事能力比特朗普政府公开承认的要多。 @ellee_watson @JimLaPorta 和我：https://www.cbsnews.com/news/iran-more-capable-than-trump-admin-publicly-acknowledging/ - Jennifer Jacobs 推文

text: Open Source Intel Senior U.S. official to News 12: Iran is fully split between its negotiators and the army and Revolutionary Guards. tweet

text: WarTranslated Due to the war in Iran, the supply of certain weapons critical to Ukraine has been disrupted, says Zelenskyy. According to him, this specifically concerns interceptor missiles for air defense systems. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047014844964950299/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 泽连斯基表示，由于伊朗战争，乌克兰关键武器的供应受到干扰。据他称，这特别涉及防空系统的拦截导弹。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047014844964950299/photo/1 推文

text: 🇸🇴 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Somalia has announced a ban on Israeli shipping through the Bab Al Mandeb Strait 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: ""The IDF is not preventing rescue forces from reaching the area at this stage,"" You are liars You attacked civilians in Al-Tiri, and violated the ceasefire You attacked a building were the civilians were at You shot at the ambulance moving Farah, who was shot and had a surgery in her head Amal is of unknown fate under the rubble of the building you attacked Red Cross staff had bombs fall on them from a small drone The literal red cross ambulance has bullet holes in it. You'd think when your military has to investigate violations daily, there is something deeply rotten within it
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“‘以色列国防军目前并未阻止救援力量进入该地区。’你们是骗子。你们袭击了 Al-Tiri 的平民，违反了停火协议。你们袭击了平民所在的建筑物。你们向运送 Farah 的救护车开火，她头部中弹并接受了手术。Amal 在你们袭击的建筑物废墟下生死未卜。红十字会工作人员遭到了小型无人机投下的炸弹袭击。真正的红十字会救护车上有弹孔。你会认为，当你们的军队每天都需要调查违规行为时，其内部一定存在严重腐败。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧The IDF said its troops identified two vehicles in southern Lebanon that had departed from a Hezbollah-linked military structure and approached Israeli forces after crossing the Forward Defense Line. The individuals were deemed to be violating ceasefire…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: In response to an Israeli ceasefire violation and a drone strike targeting a car in Tayri, we targeted a command Humvee belonging to the Israeli army in Qantara with an attack drone, achieving a direct hit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧以色列国防军称，其部队在黎巴嫩南部发现两辆车辆，它们从与真主党有关的军事设施出发，在越过前沿防线后接近以色列军队。这些人被认为违反了停火协议……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发表声明：为回应以色列违反停火协议并用无人机袭击 Tayri 的一辆汽车，我们用攻击型无人机袭击了位于 Qantara 的以色列军队的一辆指挥悍马车，并直接命中。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ In response to the Israeli violation of the ceasefire and attacked a civilian car today in Al-Tiri and killing two civilians Hezbullah attacked with an FPV an Israeli humvee vehicle in the Lebanese town of Al-Qantara
text_zh: ❗️ 为回应以色列违反停火协议并于今日袭击 Al-Tiri 的一辆平民车辆导致两名平民死亡，真主党使用 FPV 无人机袭击了黎巴嫩 Al-Qantara 镇的一辆以色列悍马车。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said its troops identified two vehicles in southern Lebanon that had departed from a Hezbollah-linked military structure and approached Israeli forces after crossing the Forward Defense Line. The individuals were deemed to be violating ceasefire understandings and posing an immediate threat, prompting an Israeli Air Force strike on one of the vehicles. The structure from which they had departed was also targeted. The IDF said it received reports that two journalists were injured in the strikes, adding that it is not preventing rescue teams from reaching the area and that the incident is under review. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军称，其部队在黎巴嫩南部发现两辆车辆，它们从与真主党有关的军事设施出发，在越过前沿防线后接近以色列军队。这些人被认为违反了停火协议并构成直接威胁，促使以色列空军对其中一辆车辆进行了打击。他们出发的设施也成为了打击目标。以色列国防军表示，已收到两名记者在袭击中受伤的报告，并补充说并未阻止救援队进入该地区，目前该事件正在审查中。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump managed to save AI generated women from death. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普成功拯救了人工智能生成的女性免于死亡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: NEW: Trump administration is expected to move to reclassify marijuana as soon as Wednesday. Source: Axios
text_zh: 最新消息：预计特朗普政府最早将于周三采取行动，将大麻重新分类。来源：Axios

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 N12: U.S. officials are uncertain about who is making decisions in Iran due to a power struggle between the IRGC and the civilian leadership. The Iranian Supreme Leader Khamenei, is reportedly not communicating with the rest of the leadership, and there is a rift between the negotiating team and the military. A US official noted that there is a complete divide within Iran between the negotiating team and the military, with neither side having full access to the Supreme Leader. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 N12：由于伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队与文职领导层之间的权力斗争，美国官员不确定伊朗目前由谁在做决策。据报道，伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊没有与其余领导层沟通，谈判团队与军方之间存在分歧。一位美国官员指出，伊朗内部在谈判团队和军方之间存在完全的割裂，双方都无法完全接触到最高领袖。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇫🇷🇺🇳🇺🇸🇮🇱 Photo showcases Israeli gunfire on a Lebanese Red Cross vehicle, despite approval from the mechanism. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 Lebanese Civil Defense sources to Al-Akhbar: The location of journalist Amal Khalil has been identified in the house destroyed by an Israeli airstrike while she was inside with journalist Zainab Faraj, and excavation operations are currently underway to reach her. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇫🇷🇺🇳🇺🇸🇮🇱 照片显示以色列向一辆黎巴嫩红十字会车辆开火，尽管该车辆已获得机制批准。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩民防部门消息人士告诉《Al-Akhbar》：记者 Amal Khalil 的位置已在被以色列空袭摧毁的房屋中确定，当时她与记者 Zainab Faraj 在屋内，目前挖掘工作正在进行中以营救她。@wfwitness
